title: WW's F[ric]kin' Mod
description:
A stupid mod full of shitposts and other ideas that came to me in a dream.
Updates come out whenever I want them to, shoutout to my friend xerenox for a good chunk of sprites whenever I got lazy.
body:
![Text made of ice with snow on top reading "Winkwing's Frickin' Mod"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6829170f69ebaa045b37cdd95e40ca5d3bf4e69.png)
WW'S F[ric]kin' Mod is a mod made by me with the help of some friends that's full of shitposts, jokes, and random chaos that I decided to cook up. There are a few inside jokes I doubt many will get, but in general I tried to make the mod as accessible to people as possible.

### This mod is best played with a recipe browser installed.

# Xeredon's Research: Part I
A post-Chaus recipe has been added for the Xeredon Battery, which requires various components across the dimensions to be crafted. This powerful energy source can be used for unlimited RF to the block above it, but it comes at a hefty cost. This is part one of a larger update that is soon to release, so be prepared for some new, _colder_ content. ;)

# Anklets  
Anklets are new curios slot that have various utilities. They can be either crafted, found, or obtained through other means. They provide unique bonuses not found elsewhere, and each provide a unique effect to their user. Except the spiky one. That one just kills you.

# Ores  
The mod also adds an array of new ores, ranging from new gems like Orkillum to metals such as Mytharium. Each has their own unique uses, and can be found in each of the newly added dimensions as well as some being native to the Overworld. However, some must be crafted through creating compound dusts and smelting them down into ingots. Each are powerful and unique, each made with love and care.
(not Funkium, we don't talk about Funkium)

# Warrior Dens  
Warrior Dens are a new and unique structure that can be found incredibly rarely around the Overworld, and inside hold remnants of formerly powerful weapons. By smelting down these unawakened weapons, you will recieve Warrior Remnant, which can be used to restore another weapon to its former glory, creating a powerful weapon to aid you on your journey into harsher dimensions such as Chaus.

# Final Notes  
This mod contains so much more content that I just couldn't realistically fit into this one page, and the only way to find everything is to install the mod and play. You will need 2 things, however.
1. A mod that adds a form of energy generation and transfer.
2. Any mod that adds properly tagged steel. (See Cat's Delight, it contains one such metal.)

With these installed, you can get the **most** out of this mod. I hope you enjoy the mod as much as I enjoyed creating it, and would love to see the things you create with the mod! You can showcase it to me in my discord, linked below, and I'll be sure to give it a look! Feel free to chat with members as well, as I'm trying to grow a more open community. If you made it this far, thank you so so much for reading!
